message:
Port Feather operators to the new executor (#6045)

## 🔍 Problem

- `read_feather` and `write_feather` still depended on the legacy
executor path.
- Feather coverage still lived in `test-legacy`, so neo had no direct
coverage for these operators.

## 🛠️ Solution

- Port both operators to `Operator<>`.
- Keep the legacy parser/printer path intact.
- Move the ported tests to `test/tests/operators/read_feather` and
`test/tests/operators/write_feather`.
- Preserve the existing write options, including
`compression_type="uncompressed"`.

## 💬 Review

- Focus on the streaming behavior in `ReadFeather` and `WriteFeather`.
- Check that the moved tests still cover round-trip and validation
behavior.
- No changelog entry by request.

<sub>
🔗 Documentation PR: https://github.com/tenzir/docs/pull/264
</sub>

files.patch:
@@ -1,18 +0,0 @@
----
-runner: multi
----
-
-let $feather_512 = f"{env("TENZIR_TMP_DIR")}/zeek.feather"
-
-// Pipeline 1: write to Feather file
-from f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
-  decompress_gzip
-  read_zeek_tsv
-}
-batch 512
-write_feather
-save_file $feather_512
-
-from_file $feather_512
-measure
-drop timestamp

@@ -1,25 +0,0 @@
----
-runner: multi
----
-
-let $feather_uncompressed = f"{env("TENZIR_TMP_DIR")}/zeek.uncompressed.feather"
-let $feather_compressed = f"{env("TENZIR_TMP_DIR")}/zeek.compressed.feather"
-
-from f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
-  decompress_gzip
-  read_zeek_tsv
-}
-batch
-write_feather compression_type="uncompressed"
-save_file $feather_uncompressed
-
-from f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
-  decompress_gzip
-  read_zeek_tsv
-}
-batch
-write_feather compression_level=20, compression_type="zstd"
-save_file $feather_compressed
-
-shell f"python -c \"import json, os; uncompressed=os.path.getsize('{$feather_uncompressed}'); compressed=os.path.getsize('{$feather_compressed}'); assert compressed < uncompressed, f'compressed {{compressed}} >= {{uncompressed}}'; print(json.dumps({{'uncompressed': uncompressed, 'compressed': compressed}}))\""
-read_json

@@ -1,9 +0,0 @@
-error: Invalid: Unrecognized compression type: wrongname
-  --> tests/operators/feather/invalid_compression.tql:10:54
-   |
-10 | write_feather compression_level=-1, compression_type="wrongname"
-   |                                                      ^^^^^^^^^^^ 
-   |
-   = note: failed to parse compression type
-   = note: must be `lz4` or `zstd`
-   = note: failed to initialize `write_feather`

@@ -1,8 +0,0 @@
----
-error: true
----
-
-from f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
-  decompress_gzip
-}
-read_feather

@@ -1 +0,0 @@
-error: truncated 1026730 trailing bytes

@@ -1,18 +0,0 @@
----
-runner: multi
----
-
-let $feather_zstd = f"{env("TENZIR_TMP_DIR")}/zeek.zstd.feather"
-
-// Pipeline 1: write to Feather file
-from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
-  decompress_gzip
-  read_zeek_tsv
-}
-batch 256
-write_feather compression_level=10, compression_type="zstd"
-save_file $feather_zstd
-
-// Pipeline 2: read from Feather file and show statistics
-from_file $feather_zstd
-top service

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
+  decompress_gzip
+  read_zeek_tsv
+}
+batch 512
+write_feather
+read_feather
+measure
+drop timestamp

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+---
+error: true
+---
+
+from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
+  decompress_gzip
+  read_feather
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: truncated Feather input
+ --> tests/operators/read_feather/invalid_format.tql:7:3
+  |
+7 |   read_feather
+  |   ^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |
+  = note: discarded 1026730 trailing bytes

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
+  decompress_gzip
+  read_zeek_tsv
+}
+batch 256
+write_feather compression_level=10, compression_type="zstd"
+split_bytes 1
+read_feather
+summarize total=count(), service
+sort service

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+---
+error: true
+---
+
+from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/feather/truncated_boundary.feather" {
+  read_feather
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+error: truncated Feather input
+ --> tests/operators/read_feather/truncated_boundary.tql:6:3
+  |
+6 |   read_feather
+  |   ^^^^^^^^^^^^ 
+  |
+  = note: discarded 344 trailing bytes

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
+  decompress_gzip
+  read_zeek_tsv
+}
+batch
+write_feather compression_type="uncompressed"
+measure cumulative=true
+summarize bytes=max(bytes)

@@ -2,10 +2,10 @@
 error: true
 ---
 
-from f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
+from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
   decompress_gzip
   read_zeek_tsv
 }
 batch 256
 write_feather compression_level=-1, compression_type="wrongname"
-save_file  f"{env("TENZIR_TMP_DIR")}/bad-compression.feather"
+discard

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+error: invalid Feather compression type
+  --> tests/operators/write_feather/invalid_compression.tql:10:54
+   |
+10 | write_feather compression_level=-1, compression_type="wrongname"
+   |                                                      ^^^^^^^^^^^ 
+   |
+   = note: Invalid: Unrecognized compression type: wrongname
+   = note: must be `uncompressed`, `lz4`, or `zstd`

@@ -1,20 +1,9 @@
----
-runner: multi
----
-
-let $feather_lz4 = f"{env("TENZIR_TMP_DIR")}/zeek.lz4.feather"
-
 from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
   decompress_gzip
   read_zeek_tsv
 }
 slice begin=1150, end=1160
 batch 512
 write_feather compression_level=7, compression_type="lz4", min_space_savings=0.6
-save_file $feather_lz4
-
-// Pipeline 2: read from Feather file and show statistics.
-from_file $feather_lz4 {
-  read_feather
-}
+read_feather
 summarize total=count()

@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
+  decompress_gzip
+  read_zeek_tsv
+}
+batch 256
+write_feather compression_level=10, compression_type="zstd"
+read_feather
+summarize total=count(), service
+sort service

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+from_file f"{env("TENZIR_INPUTS")}/zeek/conn.log.gz" {
+  decompress_gzip
+  read_zeek_tsv
+}
+batch
+write_feather compression_level=20, compression_type="zstd"
+measure cumulative=true
+summarize bytes=max(bytes)
